status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 171, Number 113 (Monday, June 30, 2025)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Ms. DeLAURO:
H.R. 4253.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article I of the United States Constitution and its
subsequent amendments, and further clarified and interpreted
by the Supreme Court of the United States.
[Page H3036]

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.

status.title: Expanding Access to Mental Health Services in Schools Act of 2025
